response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his resume shows limited direct exposure to C++ (only brief experience with C in 2014-2015) and no clear evidence of working with industrial automation, secure development lifecycle practices (e.g., IEC 62443), or high-performance concurrent systems required for the role. His focus on web/mobile development, scripting languages, and D does not align well with the core C++ and industrial cybersecurity demands of this position.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and analytical skills demonstrated through diverse technical projects
Experience with high-performance and low-latency systems (e.g., DLang at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly and adapt to different stacks
concerns: Lacks the required 8-12 years of C++ experience (only brief C experience)
No clear evidence of working with industrial automation protocols or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards
Minimal exposure to cloud platforms (Azure) or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices
